commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a dated Claude Haiku 4.5 row to the bundled Anthropic plugin static model catalog.

PR surface: Source +11. Total +11 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main lacks a Haiku Anthropic static catalog row, and the resolver exact-matches normalized ids. The PR proves the dated id path only, while the linked rolling alias remains absent from the manifest and normalization policy.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can complete the PR by adding alias coverage and tests without needing a product decision.

target.title: fix(anthropic): add haiku catalog entry
target.body:
Fixes #90088.

## What changed

- Adds Claude Haiku 4.5 to the Anthropic provider-owned static model catalog.
- Keeps resolution logic unchanged; this only fills the missing static catalog row for the `anthropic` api_key provider path.

## Real behavior proof

Setup:

- Repository: OpenClaw checkout.
- Branch under test: `fastino-90088-haiku-model`.
- Proof script imports the real bundled static catalog resolver from `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.static-catalog.ts` and resolves `anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` against each checkout's actual bundled plugin manifest.

Before, on current main:

```text
node_modules/.bin/tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-90088-proof.ts /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw
null
```

After, on this branch:

```text
node_modules/.bin/tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-90088-proof.ts /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw-tui-90088b
{
  "provider": "anthropic",
  "id": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "name": "Claude Haiku 4.5",
  "contextWindow": 200000,
  "maxTokens": 64000,
  "input": [
    "text",
    "image"
  ]
}
```

## Verification

```text
git diff --check -- extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json
```

No output.

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.static-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.test.ts

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  5 passed (5)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  44 passed (44)

[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 7.76s
```

## Platforms tested

- macOS local checkout with Node 26 and repository test runner.

## Limitations

- This proves the source-level static catalog resolution path; it does not make a live Anthropic API request.
target.author: sahibzada-allahyar
